name: Lime Cooler
description: A refreshing Bacardi Lime cocktail with watermelon, lime, and soda water, served over crushed or cubed ice. Celebrate summer with the flavourful taste combination of BACARDÍ Lime and watermelon. Topped off with sparkling club soda, the BACARDÍ Lime Cooler quenches your summer thirst.
recipe_steps: Combine all ingredients except club soda in a shaker.
Shake vigorously with plenty of ice.
Strain into a highball glass over crushed or cubed ice, and top with club soda.
Garnish with a lime wheel and watermelon wedge.
searchable_text: Lime Cooler main rum BACARDĺ Lime Flavoured rum A refreshing Bacardi Lime cocktail with watermelon, lime, and soda water, served over crushed or cubed ice. Celebrate summer with the flavourful taste combination of BACARDÍ Lime and watermelon. Topped off with sparkling club soda, the BACARDÍ Lime Cooler quenches your summer thirst. ingredients 44 ml BACARDĺ Lime Flavoured rum, 15 ml Watermelon Liquer, 15 ml Lime Juice, 10 ml Simple Syrup, 44 ml Soda Water recipe steps Combine all ingredients except club soda in a shaker. Shake vigorously with plenty of ice. Strain into a highball glass over crushed or cubed ice, and top with club soda. Garnish with a lime wheel and watermelon wedge.
